metadata.title: Recent Files
metadata.description: List files by most recently opened

regex.source: .setDesc("Maximum number of filenames to keep in the list.")
.appendText("If this plugin adds value for you and you would like to help support continued development, please use the buttons below:")
regex.target: .appendText("如果这个插件对你有帮助并且你希望支持我继续开发，请使用下方的按钮：")

regex.source: .append("RegExp patterns to ignore. One pattern per line. See "),e.append(C),e.append(" for help.")
regex.target: .append("忽略正则模式。每行一个规则。请参阅 "),e.append(C),e.append(" 以获取帮助.")

regex.source: .Notice("Cannot find a file with that name")
.Notice("List length must be a positive integer")
